description: Fixes memory exhaustion bugs in libvirt leading to denial of service for managed virtual machines. No data loss or system compromise risks.
Fixes moderate impact integer overflow in memalign function. glibc is critical but this specific issue has moderate impact.
Bug fixes and enhancements for initscripts. No critical security issues identified. Network configuration improvements.
Bug fixes for SELinux labels and rseq patch in Kubernetes. No critical security issues. Container orchestration improvements.
Bug fixes for 389-ds-base including replication issues and memory leaks. No critical security issues. Directory service improvements.
Enhancement update with multiple package updates for KVM. No critical security issues. Virtualization platform updates.
Fixes SSL certificate validation issues and denial of service in resource agents. Resource agent configuration updates.
Fixes resource exhaustion from malicious certificates and PKCS11 token issues. No data loss or system compromise risks.
reason: [Dependency Conflict (Breaks App)] 의존성으로 서비스 충돌 및 장애 우려

description: Fixes multiple critical vulnerabilities in BIND DNS server including remote code execution (CVE-2025-12345), DNS cache poisoning (CVE-2025-12346), and denial of service. Essential for network infrastructure security.
reason: [Environment Mismatch (e.g., Module not used)] not used

description: Fixes critical vulnerabilities in nftables firewall including local privilege escalation (CVE-2025-12347), buffer overflows, and potential root access. Fundamental to network security.
Fixes multiple critical vulnerabilities in OpenSSL including remote code execution, buffer overflows, and cryptographic weaknesses. Essential for SSL/TLS security.
Fixes critical vulnerabilities in PostgreSQL including SQL injection (CVE-2025-12348), privilege escalation, and data access. Critical for database security.
Fixes critical vulnerabilities in Samba including remote code execution (CVE-2025-12349), privilege escalation, and authentication bypass. Handles file sharing and authentication.
Fixes critical vulnerabilities in SSH daemon including authentication bypass and privilege escalation. Critical for secure remote access.
Fixes critical boot loader vulnerabilities affecting system boot process. Essential for secure boot functionality.
Sync test
Auto-sync path fix test
Critical remote code execution in GitHub Actions workflow due to unsanitized branch name interpolation, allowing arbitrary command execution with repository write permissions.

description:
An update for linux-firmware is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The linux-firmware packages contain all of the firmware files that are required by various devices to operate.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update linux-firmware to latest upstream [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-145523)

An update for libvirt is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Kernel-based Virtual Machine (KVM) offers a full virtualization solution forLinux on numerous hardware platforms. The virt:rhel module contains packageswhich provide user-space components used to run virtual machines using KVM.The packages also provide APIs for managing and interacting with the virtualized systems.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Hyperv feature validation is too tight for i440fx machine type [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-140916)
reason: [Other] libvirt 는 RHEL 에서 사용하지 않음.

description:
An update for qemu-kvm is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Kernel-based Virtual Machine (KVM) is a full virtualization solution for Linux on a variety of architectures. The qemu-kvm packages provide the user-space component for running virtual machines that use KVM.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL 9]snp guest fail to boot with hugepage [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-129551)  scsi-block: Error policy is ignored for host_status errors [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-130209)  The VM hit io error when do S3-PR integration on the pass-through  failover multipath device [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-133302)  Live migration after workload update fails with operation failed: guest CPU doesn't match specification: missing features: pdcm [rhel-9] (JIRA:RHEL-135451)

An update for shim is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The shim package contains a first-stage UEFI boot loader that handles chaining to a trusted full boot loader under secure boot environments.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): shim 8_10 release needs to be bumped to match 8_9 to fix broken update path (JIRA:RHEL-113358)  Leapp IPU 8.10>9.7 fails due to an invalid signature for the kernel (JIRA:RHEL-126741)

An update for lvm2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The lvm2 packages include complete support for handling read and write operations on physical volumes, creating volume groups from one or more physical volumes, and creating one or more logical volumes in volume groups.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL 8.10 after upgrade lvraid1 LV's that had intergity before now fail to setup integrity.  (JIRA:RHEL-118797)
